title: Announcer
description: With this mod you can announce stuff on your server with an easy to use ui.
body:
# Announcer
The Announcer is a simple yet powerful tool designed to make in-game announcements easy and customizable.

This Datapack/Mod allows you to open a dialog menu to quickly create and broadcast announcements to the server. You can choose the format, enter your text, and select a color, all through a user-friendly interface.

## Key Features
Select **Announcement Type**: Choose how your message is displayed:

- **Chat Message**: Standard text in the chat window.

- **Title**: Large, centered text on the screen.

- **Actionbar**: Subtle text displayed above the hotbar.

**Text Input**: Easily enter the message you want to broadcast.

**Color Selection**: Personalize your announcement with one of five colors: White, Red, Yellow, Green, or Blue.

## How to Access the Menu
The Announcer menu can be opened in two ways:

**Pause Menu Button:** 

Press the '**Announcer**' **button** located in the **Pause Menu**.


Or use the following command in the chat:


```
/dialog show @a announce:list
```


## Disclaimer regarding Mod Menu
If you are using the Mod Menu mod, you may encounter a conflict:

Although the Announcer button will appear in the Pause Menu, clicking it will incorrectly open the Mod Menu interface instead.

### How to Fix This Issue:

To resolve this, you need to change a setting within the Mod Menu configuration:

1. Go to the Mod Menu settings.

2. Find the setting labeled "Game Menu:".

3. Change its value from "Replace" to "Inserted".

This adjustment ensures that the Announcer button functions as intended without being overridden by Mod Menu.
